project.name: Cascada Library - Fabric Cluster Lifecycle
project.description: The Fabric-style cluster deployment layer (plan §6.7): real kubectl-apply-shaped YAML templates under src/main/resources/fabric, a tiny class that fills them from environment variables, and a Fabric8 Kubernetes-client deployer that applies (apply -f), stops, restarts, and deletes the cluster. The templates are the single source of manifest shape; Java only overrides values and talks to the API server.
